summary: Soundboard recording with good pitch correction captures an intimate late show highlighted by a mellow Help‑Slip‑Franklin sequence.
review: Both reviewers praise the performance as satisfying and intimate, especially noting the relaxed groove of the Help > Slip > Franklin's segment. The Charlie Miller‑mastered soundboard tape benefits from pitch correction that eliminates the “molasses” effect, delivering clear and enjoyable audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both musical performance (especially the HSF sequence) and recording quality (soundboard with effective pitch correction), yielding a solid rating despite only two reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Charlie Miller's mastering with pitch correction removes the low‑speed, molasses‑like sound; overall clear and listenable with no reported dropouts.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: An intimate, late‑night atmosphere with a relaxed pacing that culminates in a mellow Help‑Slip‑Franklin sequence.
